overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a hooded character jogging along a mountain trail at night. The character passes a wooden market stall and encounters an NPC while navigating rocky terrain under a clear starry sky.

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the narrow dirt path between rocky cliffs and sloped terrain

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with gray stone texture rising on the right side of the path
grassy sloped terrain ascending on the left side of the trail
uneven dirt trail with scattered stones winding through the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow rocky canyon at night, with steep cliff faces on the right and sloping terrain on the left. The path is uneven dirt with scattered rocks and sparse vegetation under a dark blue sky.

events.description: path widens revealing a wooden market stall with canopy ahead on the left

agents.ego_description: approaching a wooden structure while maintaining running pace along the widening trail

entered.detail: simple wooden structure with fabric canopy and shelves on the left side of the path
ancient stone building ruins visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up as the character approaches a wooden market stall with a canopy on the left side of the path. Ancient stone ruins become visible in the distance while the rocky cliff recedes further to the right.

events.description: female NPC in light dress walks past the character in the opposite direction
character passes the wooden market stall and leaves it behind

agents.ego_description: passing the market stall and navigating around an NPC pedestrian while continuing along the trail

notable_agents.action: woman in light-colored dress walking in the opposite direction past the character

entered.detail: dense bushes and shrubs on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes the wooden market stall and encounters a female NPC walking in the opposite direction. The path continues past the vendor area with rocky outcrops and bushes lining the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain trail with rock formations

events.description: terrain opens up with larger rock formations and scattered trees becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path through more open terrain with distinct rock features

entered.detail: distinctive large mushroom-shaped rock outcrop on the right side of the path
small trees and shrubs scattered on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a more open area with a distinctive large rock formation on the right and scattered trees on the left. The path continues winding through the mountainous terrain under the clear night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow mountain canyon that gradually opens into a wider, inhabited highland trail under a starry night sky. It begins with the character running through a tight rocky pass flanked by steep cliff faces and uneven dirt paths. As the trail expands, the camera passes a wooden market stall with a canopy on the left, revealing ancient stone ruins emerging in the distance. The scene then shifts as the character encounters a female NPC walking in the opposite direction, moving past the vendor area and rocky outcrops. Finally, the path winds into a more open landscape characterized by a large rock formation on the right and scattered trees on the left.
